base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of roads_rails_power — a tile from 1989 simcity. Infrastructure tiles — road/rail/power-line connection variants (L/T/+ junctions). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
